client.name: Potomac Boat Rentals
client.industry: Pontoon boat, kayak, and stand-up paddleboard rentals on the Potomac River
client.service_area: Woodbridge, VA / Prince William County / Potomac River
client.tone: Warm, friendly, family-run marina feel. Genuine enthusiasm for the river and the outdoors. First names, a little informality. Never corporate, never a mass-marketing blast.
client.positioning_statement: Potomac Boat Rentals is a family-run marina on Neabsco Creek in Woodbridge, VA offering pontoon boat, kayak, and paddleboard rentals on the Potomac River — no experience required, no ownership costs, just a great day on the water.

services.name: Pontoon Boat Rentals
services.description: Spacious, easy-to-operate pontoon boats for groups, families, and fishing trips on the Potomac River. Experience the boating lifestyle without the cost of ownership.

services.name: Kayak Rentals
services.description: Explore the pristine waters and undisturbed wetlands of Neabsco Creek, Featherstone National Wildlife Refuge, and the Julie J. Metz Wetlands Preserve.

services.name: Stand-Up Paddleboard Rentals
services.description: SUP rentals for calm-water paddling through Neabsco Creek with access to Leesylvania State Park and local wildlife areas.

trust_pillars: Family-run, locally owned marina in Woodbridge, VA
Located on historic Neabsco Creek — gateway to the Potomac River
Fraction of the cost of boat ownership — no slip fees, insurance, or maintenance
differentiators: Pontoon, kayak, and paddleboard rentals all in one place
Direct access to Featherstone National Wildlife Refuge and Leesylvania State Park
Perfect for families, groups, fishing trips, and wildlife viewing
No ownership costs — skip the slip fees, repairs, taxes, and winterization
Operating from Hamptons Landing Marina on scenic Neabsco Creek

founder.name: Patrick
founder.signature: Patrick & the Potomac Boat Rentals Team

email.subject: Hope you had a great time on the water! 🚤
email.sender_signature:

email.html_template:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks so much for choosing Potomac Boat Rentals! We hope your {{rental_type}} rental was a blast and that you got to enjoy everything the Potomac has to offer.

If you have a spare moment, we'd really appreciate it if you could leave us a quick Google review. It means the world to a small business like ours and helps other boaters find us:

👉 Leave a Review

Thanks again, hope to see you back on the water soon!

Patrick & the Potomac Boat Rentals Team
📞 703-677-1357
🌐 potomacboatrentals.com

sms.template: Hi {{first_name}}! Thanks for renting with Potomac Boat Rentals. We'd love it if you left us a quick Google review — it means so much to a small business like ours: https://search.google.com/local/writereview?placeid=ChIJuS-xxEf_tokR_MHChjc84JQ

voice_rules: Warm, conversational, family-run feel. Write like Patrick is talking to a neighbor, not a press release.
Lead with the experience — the river, the view, the freedom — not logistics or pricing.
Celebrate local destinations: Neabsco Creek, Featherstone National Wildlife Refuge, Julie J. Metz Wetlands, Leesylvania State Park, Potomac River.
Core use cases to reference naturally: families, groups, friends, fishing, wildlife viewing, date days, summer fun.
Never corporate. No buzzwords. Short, punchy captions preferred over long blocks of text.
Use seasonal and outdoor hashtags when relevant (#summer, #outdoors, #kayaking, #fishing, #wildlife).

avoid: Overpromising specific weather or water conditions
Exact pricing without directing to website (prices may vary by season)
Implying year-round availability without confirming hours

cta_rotation: Call us at 703-677-1357 to reserve your spot.

conversion.goal: Booking via website or phone call
